name: python3-pyshodan
title: python3-pyshodan
summary: script for interacting with Shodan API (Python 3)
description:
script for interacting with Shodan API (Python 3)
This package contains a Python 3 script for interacting with Shodan API. It
has three modes of operation: making an API query for a search term, for a
single IP address, or for a list of IP addresses in a .txt file.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyshodan because script for interacting with Shodan API (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyshodan as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyshodan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyshodan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
